ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Default measurement unit for the clothing type (e.g., centimeters, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the clothing type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the size chart belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the measurement (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "back_length" REAL /* Back length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_width" REAL /* Sleeve width measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the history belongs to */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was changed */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "previous_measurement" TEXT /* Previous measurement value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_chart_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, pattern maker, quality control) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
